query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_authors FROM author_profiles; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_books FROM book_profiles; SELECT id, authorName FROM author_profiles WHERE authorName LIKE '%Cialdini%' OR authorName LIKE '%Thaler%' OR authorName LIKE '%Hawking%' OR authorName = 'Founders Pocket Guide';
